nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 4am. Cloudy. Low around 39, with temperatures rising to around 43 overnight. East wind 12 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 1pm and 5pm. Cloudy. High near 50, with temperatures falling to around 48 in the afternoon. Northeast wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Cloudy. Low around 36, with temperatures rising to around 40 overnight. North wind around 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws.name: Monday
